name: Alejandro Viana
summary: Computer Engineer with a passion for web development and cloud computing. Experienced in building scalable web applications and deploying them using modern DevOps practices.

projects.name: World Cup Stats Visualizer
projects.description: A web service for visualizing World Cup head to head matches between the 8 teams that have won the tournament

projects.name: YOLOv8 Object Detection
projects.description: Development of an object detection system using YOLOv8 to enable real-time object detection and autonomous flight for a DJI Tello drone

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A responsive portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills. Built a CI/CD pipeline using Cloudflare Workers.

projects.name: Finite State Machine Implementation
projects.description: Implementation of a finite state machine for managing a parking system to count the number of available spots

projects.name: HTTP Request Handler for an Inventory
projects.description: Implementation of a REStful API to handle requests to get status of machines in an inventory
